nasb.text: When he cut the hair of his head (and it was at the end of every year that he cut it, for it was heavy on him so he cut it), he weighed the hair of his head at 200 shekels by the king’s weight.

esv.text: And when he cut the hair of his head (for at the end of every year he used to cut it; when it was heavy on him, he cut it), he weighed the hair of his head, two hundred shekels by the king’s weight.

cnv.text: 他每年年底剪髮一次，因為他頭上的頭髮太厚，所以把它剪下來；他把頭髮剪下來以後，總是把頭髮稱一稱；按照王的法碼重約兩公斤。

ccb.text: 他的头发浓密，每年年终会很沉重，需要剪发，剪下的头发按王的重量标准约重两公斤。
